assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-8 contain '## Repository Registry' with a table. Row 1: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |'. Row 2: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. Both entries present with correct Serena instance names.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 10-16 contain '## Jira Configuration' followed by all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18 has '## Code Intelligence'. Line 20 reads: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Lines 25-29 provide a concrete example using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31 contains '### Limitations'. It appears after '## Code Intelligence' (line 18) and before '## Bug Configuration' (line 35), confirming it is a subheading under Code Intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 10-13: 'Discovered 2 Serena instances by scanning for tools matching the `mcp__<instance>__<tool>` naming pattern:' followed by '**serena_backend**' and '**serena_ui**' with their respective tool lists. Line 9 confirms source: 'Source: MCP tool listing in `mcp-tools-with-serena.md`'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 5: 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no `# Project Configuration` section. All configuration sections were newly created.' Lines 9-32 list each section as '(new)': '## Repository Registry (new)', '## Jira Configuration (new)', '## Code Intelligence (new)', '## Bug Configuration (new)'. Lines 34-36 under 'Preserved': 'All existing content in the original CLAUDE.md (project title, Documentation section, Getting Started section) is preserved.'

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |'. All four required columns present in the exact order specified.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 35-39: '## Bug Configuration' followed by '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 49-52 document 'Step 10 -- Security Configuration' with 'User declined when asked whether to enable security triage for this project. Section not created.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section -- the file ends at line 39 with Bug Configuration content. The opt-in was offered and the decline was respected.
